notes: v1.14.124 - UI sweep RULE A tap-target finish. Bumped the redesign per-page back button .rf-back-btn from 40px to 56px (svg 20->24, radius 12->14) to meet Rule A's '>=56px tap target' for gloved hands; applies to #work-back + #ref-back consistently. Browser-verified at 412x915: 56x56 button, title clears, row height 56, layout clean (Ref>Optics). CSS-only, redesign-only (.rf-back-btn is New-UI chrome; legacy hides #work-back/#ref-back) -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical. Completes RULE A (one back control per surface: .122 hid the legacy chevron, .123 made deploy/rack detail use a single inline step-back, .124 sizes the back to spec). node --check x3 + sw.js, brace gate, three-stamp lockstep. DEVICE-VERIFY: the back button in Work/Ref panels is a comfortable gloved tap; ?legacy=1 unchanged.
